title: Vincent
why_this_song: Vincent by Don McLean (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Starry, starry night"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Now, I understand what you tried to say to me"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "They would not listen, they did not know how"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Starry, starry night"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "With eyes that know the darkness in my soul"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Paint your palette blue and gray
Look out on a summer's day
With eyes that know the darkness in my soul

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "starry" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "starry" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tried" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tried" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Reflect in Vincent's eyes of china blue
But I could have told you, Vincent

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Paint your palette blue and gray

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Vincent", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Vincent", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Vincent" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Vincent" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Vincent" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Vincent", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
